title: Check 'comment' command against beads interface
description: Compare bd comment arguments with beads comment. Ensure interface compatibility.
close_reason: Compatible: flat 'comment <id> <text>' matches beads deprecated alias

title: Check 'dep' command against beads interface
description: Compare bd dep subcommands (add, remove, tree) with beads dep subcommands. beads also has cycles, parent, children subcommands - decide if any belong in our subset.
close_reason: Compatible: dep add/remove/tree subset matches beads interface

title: Check 'ready' command against beads interface
description: Compare bd ready flags and behavior with beads ready (also available as --ready flag on list). Ensure interface compatibility.
close_reason: Compatible: no-flags ready matches beads base interface

title: Check 'init' command against beads interface
description: Compare bd init flags and behavior with beads init. Ensure flag names and semantics match the subset we support.

title: Rename 'add' command to 'create' to match beads
description: beads uses 'bd create' to make new issues, bd-lite uses 'bd add'. Rename to 'create' for interface compatibility. Compare all flags and semantics.

title: Check 'show' command against beads interface
description: Compare bd show arguments and output format with beads show. Ensure interface compatibility.

title: Check 'update' command against beads interface
description: Compare bd update flags with beads update. Ensure the subset of flags we support (status, priority, title, description, assignee, type, labels) match beads naming and semantics.

title: Check 'cleanup' command against beads interface
description: Compare bd cleanup flags (--older-than, --dry-run, --no-archive) with beads cleanup. Ensure interface compatibility.
close_reason: Compatible: --older-than/--dry-run match beads; --no-archive is a bd-lite addition

title: Check 'list' command against beads interface
description: Compare bd list flags and behavior with beads list. Ensure the subset of flags we support (status, priority, type, assignee, content, all) match beads naming and semantics.
close_reason: Compatible: subset flags (-s/-p/-t/-a/--all) match beads. --content is a bd-lite convenience combining title-contains and desc-contains.

title: Check 'close' command against beads interface
description: Compare bd close flags and behavior with beads close. Ensure --reason flag and multi-ID support match.
